title: Musician + Orchestra — Brand Refresh, Sales README, Logos
description: Update all *.md files, improve specs, create SVG logos, make README.md sales-oriented, integrate logos across repo and GitHub.

stories.title: Sales-oriented README.md
acceptanceCriteria: README.md opens with a compelling tagline and logo
Includes a feature comparison table with visual checkmarks
Has a clear 'Why Musician?' value proposition section
Shows provider logos/badges or provider list prominently
Has a Quick Start section with copy-pasteable commands
Includes a status badge (build, tests) or equivalent
Has a roadmap or 'What's Next' teaser section
Tone is energetic and product-forward, not documentation-forward

stories.title: Update AGENTS.md and MUSICIAN.md
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md has a clear two-section structure: Musician project + claude-code reference
AGENTS.md Quick Start commands are accurate (mix test shows 184 tests)
MUSICIAN.md is concise, up to date with Phases 1-5 complete
MUSICIAN.md references the new spec files (musician-architecture, providers, testing)
No stale content (old test counts, wrong phase status)

stories.title: Improve musician spec files
acceptanceCriteria: spec/musician-architecture.md has an accurate dependency graph and is readable
spec/musician-providers.md documents all 5 providers with accurate details
spec/musician-testing.md shows 184 test count and complete E2E strategy
All three spec files have consistent formatting and tone
spec/ index (referenced from AGENTS.md) lists all musician specs

stories.title: Create Musician SVG logo
acceptanceCriteria: assets/musician-logo.svg exists and is valid SVG
Logo is distinctive: music + terminal/CLI theme, funky/modern aesthetic
Works at 32x32 (favicon) and 512x512 (avatar) scales (scalable vector)
Uses a bold color palette (not plain black/white)
assets/musician-logo-dark.svg exists for dark backgrounds
SVG file is self-contained (no external font dependencies)

stories.title: Create Orchestra SVG logo
acceptanceCriteria: assets/orchestra-logo.svg exists and is valid SVG
Logo conveys multi-agent orchestration (conductors, networks, or nodes theme)
Visually related to Musician logo (shared design language)
Works at 32x32 and 512x512 scales
assets/orchestra-logo-dark.svg exists for dark backgrounds
SVG file is self-contained

stories.title: Integrate logos across repo docs
acceptanceCriteria: README.md shows the Musician logo prominently at the top
AGENTS.md references the logo
assets/ directory exists with all logo files
assets/favicon.svg exists (32x32 optimized version)
assets/github-avatar.svg exists (512x512 square, GitHub-optimized)

stories.title: GitHub branding setup guide
acceptanceCriteria: assets/README.md explains how to set GitHub avatar (manual steps)
assets/README.md explains how to add favicon to GitHub Pages (if applicable)
The github-avatar.svg is correctly sized at 500x500 or 512x512
Instructions mention: Settings > Profile > Change profile picture for org/user
